article_theme: A comprehensive technical and economic deep dive into Nvidia's Rubin (VR NVL72) platform, highlighting its transition to a modular cableless design, 100% liquid cooling, and strategic TCO positioning against AMD and Groq.
structure_summary: The article follows a top-down engineering logic: starting with silicon-level specifications (Rubin GPUs, Vera CPUs), moving into the rack-scale architecture (Oberon), then performing a 'tear-down' style analysis of the Compute Tray (cables, thermal, power, mechanical). It concludes with macro-level infrastructure implications (cooling/power vendors), networking evolution (NVLink 6), and a rigorous financial TCO/BoM comparison with competitors.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.next_section_title: Extreme Co-design: 6 Silicon Product Offerings under the Rubin Platform - Chip Floorplans & Specifications
sections.section_role: Establishes the high-stakes financial and technical scope of the Rubin platform while introducing the proprietary BoM/Power model as a value proposition.
translation_notes: Preserve the authoritative, market-moving tone of SemiAnalysis
Terms like 'BoM' (Bill of Materials) and 'TCO' (Total Cost of Ownership) should be used with their English abbreviations alongside Chinese
Ensure 'dislocations' is translated to reflect market disruption, not just physical displacement

sections.title: Extreme Co-design: 6 Silicon Product Offerings under the Rubin Platform - Chip Floorplans & Specifications
sections.next_section_title: Rubin Oberon Rack: NVL72 not NVL144 nor NVL36
sections.section_role: Provides the 'atomic' level technical foundation by detailing the silicon floorplans and I/O capabilities.
translation_notes: Technical accuracy for 'radix' (基数/分叉数) and 'SerDes' is non-negotiable
CPO (Co-Packaged Optics) is a critical industry term; do not confuse with standard pluggables
Avoid softening the performance metrics (e.g., 'achieved with' vs 'claims to have')

sections.title: Rubin Oberon Rack: NVL72 not NVL144 nor NVL36
sections.previous_section_title: Extreme Co-design: 6 Silicon Product Offerings under the Rubin Platform - Chip Floorplans & Specifications
sections.section_role: Argues for the paradigm shift from individual server chassis to integrated rack-scale systems (Oberon).
translation_notes: The distinction between 'Chassis' (机箱) and 'Rack' (机架) must be consistent
'Memory economics' should be translated to reflect the financial strategy, not just cost
Ensure 'pre-fill' and 'decode' (LLM inference phases) are translated using standard AI engineering terminology

sections.title: Compute Tray Redesign
sections.previous_section_title: Rubin Oberon Rack: NVL72 not NVL144 nor NVL36
sections.section_role: Introduces the central engineering thesis: modularity and the elimination of cables for reliability.
translation_notes: 'Cableless' (无电缆化/去线缆化) is the core marketing/tech claim; keep it punchy
'Point of failure' (故障点) is a standard engineering term
Maintain the contrast between 'Node-bound' host DRAM and aggregate footprint

sections.title: Compute Tray Cableless Design
sections.section_role: Explains the signal integrity (SI) physics that justify the move to high-end PCBs and connectors.
translation_notes: Precise translation of SI terms: 'Insertion loss' (插入损耗), 'Geometry loss' (几何损耗), 'Vias' (过孔)
Do not weaken the 'highway' analogy; it is meant to make complex physics accessible
'CCL' is a specific supply chain term that should remain in English or be properly glossed

sections.title: Compute Tray: Thermal
sections.section_role: Details the transition to 100% liquid cooling and the resulting manufacturing shifts.
translation_notes: Distinguish between L6 and L10 assembly levels (industry standard levels of integration)
'Pitch' (间距) in the context of cold plate channels is a critical spec
Ensure 'Quick disconnects' is translated as '快接头' or '快速断开接头'

sections.title: Compute Tray: Power Delivery
sections.section_role: Analyzes the shift to 50VDC power architecture to minimize efficiency losses.
translation_notes: 'Busbar' (母线/汇流排) is a key term here
The 'quadratic relationship' (平方关系) between loss and current is a core engineering argument; do not obscure it
Clarify 'step down' (降压) mechanics for non-electrical readers

sections.title: Compute Tray: Mechanical
sections.section_role: Describes the physical housing and blind-mate mechanisms that enable the modular assembly.
translation_notes: 'Blind-mate' or 'loading mechanism' should be translated to emphasize precision alignment
Ensure names like 'Orchid' and 'Paladin' are treated as specific product/component code names
The concept of 'force locking' components in place is central to the 'cableless' reliability argument

sections.title: Rack Level Infrastructure: Thermal
sections.section_role: Concludes with the macro-scale implications for data center operators and cooling vendors.
translation_notes: 'Inlet temperature' (进水温度) is the crucial metric for data center efficiency
'Chiller' (冷水机组) vs. 'Chiller-less' operation is the main economic takeaway
The tone should reflect a 'contrarian' view against 'Mr. Market'
